Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics Department

BCHM course.

1 BSCI223/283 is a pre-requisite for these upper level courses.

2 Credit will be given for either BSCI223 OR BSCI283. Credit cannot be granted for both courses. BSCI223/283 may count in the CEBG Area credits but NOT as an upper level lab.

3 Formerly BSCI474, cross-listed as HLSC374. Credit will be given for either BSCI374, HLSC374 or BSCI474.

4 Only one of these statistics courses will count for the CEBG Area courses.
